name: Iso11783OPChangeSoftKeyMask
title: Iso11783OPChangeSoftKeyMask
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeSoftKeyMask( dword ecuHandle, dword maskID, dword softKeyMaskID );
description: The function changes the soft key mask of a data mask. A Change Soft Key Mask command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
